title: Empires Of Alan
description: EmpiresOfAlan is a powerful Minecraft nations and land claims plugin for Paper 1.21.4, featuring towns, nations, wars, mercenary clans, and advanced chat. Designed as a modern Towny alternative, it includes, PlaceholderAPI, and BlueMap integration
body:
EmpiresOfAlan

EmpiresOfAlan is a premium, feature-rich nation and land management plugin designed for Minecraft servers running Paper 1.21.4+. Inspired by classic plugins like Towny and Factions, it provides a modern, optimized, and extensible system for managing towns, nations, wars, and roleplay communities.

✨ Core Features
🏰 Town System

Create and manage towns with customizable names and permissions

Claim and unclaim chunks with fine-grained controls

Town banks with full economy integration (Vault required)

Resident management with roles: Owner, Mayor, Knight, Member

Town spawns, protection flags (PvP, explosions, mob spawning), and teleportation

🌍 Nation System

Unite towns into nations with taxation and diplomacy

Nation hierarchies with Kings, Officers, Knights

Alliances and enemies for political roleplay

Nation spawns and teleportation networks

⚔️ War & Mercenaries

Configurable war types: capture, PvP dominance, resource control

Rewards, penalties, surrender systems, and war statistics

Hire mercenary clans for contracts and battles

Clan banks, ranks, and contracts for added roleplay depth

💬 Advanced Chat System

Multiple chat channels: local, town, nation, alliance, global

Spy/Admin mode for moderation

Rank prefixes, color-coded messages, and anti-spam/profanity filtering

🎨 GUI & Integrations

Intuitive inventory-based GUIs for all major features

Vault economy integration (required)

PlaceholderAPI support for placeholders

Optional support for EssentialsX and LuckPerms

BlueMap integration for real-time territory visualization

🔧 Technical Features

SQLite database (async operations for performance)

Event-driven modular architecture for developers

YAML-based configuration and full customization

Multi-language support, backups, and debugging tools

📦 Requirements & Dependencies

Server: Paper 1.21.4 or compatible fork

Java: 21 or higher

Required Dependency: Vault

Optional Dependencies: PlaceholderAPI
, EssentialsX
, LuckPerms
, BlueMap

🛠 Why EmpiresOfAlan?

Unlike older plugins, EmpiresOfAlan is built for modern Minecraft performance standards with async operations, caching, and modular design. It’s ideal for servers looking to create immersive geopolitical or roleplay environments with smooth gameplay and minimal lag.
